1801.full_name: 'Amr ibn Mua'dh b. Nu'man b. Imru'l Qays b. Zayd. b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Jusham b. al-Harith
1801.arabic: عمرو بن معاذ بن النعمان الأنصاري
1801.bio: Brotherhood was made b/w him and 'Umair bin Abi Waqqas.

1802.full_name: al-Harith ibn Aws ibn Mua'dh b. Nu'man b. Imru'l Qays b. Zayd. b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Jusham

1803.arabic: الحارث بن أنس بن رافع الأنصاري

1804.full_name: Sa'd bin Zayd bin Malik b. 'Ubaid('Abd) b. Ka'b b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Jusham b. al-Harith
1804.bio: Full lineage: Sa'd bin Zayd bin Malik b. 'Ubaid('Abd) b. Ka'b b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Jusham b. al-Harith b. al-Khazraj b. 'Amr b. Malik b. al-Aus

1805.full_name: Salama bin Salaama bin Waqash b. Zughba b. Za'ura b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Jusham b. al-Khazraj b. 'Amr
1805.arabic: سلمة بن سلامة بن وقش الأشهلي الأنصاري
1805.bio: The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Abu Sabra bin Abi Rahm (or al-Zubair bin al-'Awwam)

1806.full_name: 'Abbad bin Bashr bin Waqash b. Zughba b. Za'ura b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Jusham b. al-Khazraj b. 'Amr
1806.arabic: عباد بن بشر بن وقش بن زغبة
1806.bio: The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Abu Hudayfa bin 'Utba bin Rabi'

1807.full_name: Salma bin Thabit bin Waqash b. Zughba b. Za'ura b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Jusham b. al-Khazraj b. 'Amr
1807.bio: Full lineage: Salma bin Thabit bin Waqash b. Zughba b. Za'ura b. 'Abdul Ashhal b. Jusham b. al-Khazraj b. 'Amr b. Malik b. al-Aus

1808.arabic: رافع بن يزيد بن كرز بن سكن
1808.bio: His martyrdom at Uhud is not agreed upon.

1809.full_name: 'Ubaidullah bin 'Ubaid bin al-Tayyihan b. Bily b. 'Amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a
1809.arabic: عبيد الله بن عبيد بن التيهان
1809.mother_name: al-Sa'ba bint Rafi' bin 'Adi of B.'Alba b.Jafna al

1810.full_name: Mahmud ibn Maslama b. Salama b. Khalid b. 'Adi b. Majda'a b. Haritha b. al-Harith b.al-Khazraj
1810.arabic: محمود بن مسلمة بن سلمة الأنصاري

1811.full_name: Salma bin Aslam bin Harish b. 'Adi b. Majda'a b. Haritha b. al-Harith b. al-Khazraj b. 'Amr b. Malik

1812.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Sahl b. Zayd b. 'Amir b. 'Amr b. Jusham b. al-Harith b. al-Khazraj b. 'Amr b. Malik
1812.arabic: عبد الله بن سهل بن زيد الأنصاري
1812.bio: 'Amr b. Jusham b. al-Harith was brother 'Abdul Ashhal b. Jusham b. al-Harith. It is Also said that they were people of Ratij.

1813.full_name: al-Harith bin Khuzma bin 'Adi b. Abi b. Ghanm b. Salm b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. al-Khazraj
1813.father_name: Khuzma bin 'Adi b. Abi b. Ghanm
1813.bio: The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Iyas bin Abi al-Bukayr.

1814.full_name: al-Tayyihan b. Bily b. 'Amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a

1815.full_name: Malik bin al-Tayyihan b. Bily b. 'Amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a
1815.bio:
The Brotherhood was made b/w him and 'Uthman bin Mazu'an. He was one of the first Ansars to accept Islam in Makkah. Some scholars said that He was from B.Aws and his lineage was ابن التيهان بن مالك بن عمرو بن زيد بن عمرو بن جشم بن الحارث بن الخزرج بن عمرو بن مالك بن الأوس
According to some sources, He was killed in the battle of Siffin (camal) in the year 36 AH.

1816.full_name: 'Ubaid bin al-Tayyihan b. Bily b. 'Amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a
1816.bio: The Brotherhood was made b/w him and Mas'ud bin Rabi'a al-Qari. Some said that his name was 'Atik.
1816.spouses: al-Sa'ba bint Rafi' bin 'Adi of B.'Alba b.Jafna al-Ghasani

1817.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Jabr b. 'Amr b. Zayd b. Jusham b. Haritha b. al-Harith b. al-Khazraj
1817.arabic: أبو عبس بن جبر بن عمرو
1817.father_name: Jabr b. 'Amr b. Zayd b. Jusham
1817.bio:
Full Lineage : 'Abdur Rahman/'Abdullah bin Jabr b. 'Amr b. Zayd b. Jusham b. Haritha b. al-Harith b. al-Khazraj b. 'Amr b. Malik b. al-Aus
The brotherhood was made b/w him and Khunays bin Hudhayfa. He was involved in the killing of Ka'b bin Ashraf.

1818.full_name: Mas'ud bin ('Abd) Sa'd b. 'Amir b. 'Adi b. Jushum b. Majda'a b. Haritha b. al-Harith b. al-Khazraj
1818.arabic: مسعود بن عبد سعد بن عامر

1819.full_name: Ma'bad bin ('Abd) Sa'd b. 'Amir b. 'Adi b. Jushum b. Majda'a b. Haritha b. al-Harith b. al-Khazraj
1819.arabic: معبد بن عبد سعد بن عامر

1820.full_name: Hani bin Niyar b. Amr b. 'Ubayd b. Kilab b. Duhman..... b. Bali b. 'Amr b. al-Haaf b. Quda'a
1820.bio: Other names are al-Harith or Malik. It is said he was uncle of al-Bara' bin Azib (his mother's brother).
1820.students: 400,34,ابن أخيه سعيد بن عمير بن عقبة بن نيار,11192,11810

1821.full_name: 'Amir/'Abdullah bin Sa'ida bin 'Amir b. 'Adi b. Majda'a b. Haritha b. al-Harith b. al-Khazraj

1824.students: 11669,18082,27354,يزيد بن أبي مريم الشامي عن أمة عنه

1825.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Muhammad b. Maslama b. Salama b. Khalid b. 'Adi b. Majda'a b. Haritha b. al-Harith
1825.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن محمد بن مسلمة الأنصاري

1826.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Muhammad b. Maslama b. Salama b. Khalid b. 'Adi b. Majda'a b. Haritha b. al-Harith

1829.arabic: زيد بن محمد بن مسلمة الأنصاري

1834.bio: He was accidentally killed by Muslims during the battle of Uhud,
